figures.caption: Figure 2. Fitting of PM SrIrO3 at q=(0.5 0.2 0.5) (a), (0.5 0.5 0.5) (b) and (0.5 0.5 0.2) (c). The paramagnon excitations are represented with shaded blue. Other components include elastic, phonon, multi-magnon and dd excitation peaks. Fittings of all RIXS spectra can be seen in supplement [39].
Figure 3. Momentum dependent evolution of magnetic excitations along K and L directions with doping levels of x = 0, 0.06 and 0.1. More doping levels were shown in supplement [39].
